title: Secrets in Unity Catalog (Public Preview)
body: You can now store, govern, and access secrets as securable objects in Unity Catalog. A Unity Catalog secret uses the three-level namespace (`catalog.schema.secret`) and is governed by Unity Catalog privileges, so you can apply the same access controls and auditing that you use for other data assets. See [Secrets in Unity Catalog](/aws/en/security/secrets/unity-catalog-secrets).
